## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (added/updated tests for new behavior)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Core logic stays in `src/core/*` and does not import `vscode`

- [ ] User-facing strings are localized (English base)
